entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Naša usluga omogućuje vam da objavite, povezujete, pohranite, dijelite i na drugi režim date na raspolaganje određene informacije, tekst, grafiku, video, ili drugi materijal ("kontent"). Vi ste odgovorni za sadržaj koji ste objavili na ili putem usluge, uključujući njegovu zakonitost, pouzdanost i prikladnost. Postavljanjem sadržaja na ili putem usluge, zastupate i jamčite da: (i) Sadržaj je vaš (posjedujete ga) i/ili imate pravo koristiti ga i pravo da nam date prava i licencu kako je predviđeno ovim Uslovima, i (ii) da postavljanje Vašeg sadržaja na ili putem usluge ne krši prava privatnosti, prava javnosti, autorska prava, prava ugovora ili bilo koja druga prava bilo koje osobe ili subjekta. Pridržavamo se prava da prekinemo račun svakoga tko se smatra kršenjem autorskih prava. Zadržavate bilo koje i sva vaša prava na bilo koji sadržaj koji predajete, objavite ili prikazujete na ili putem usluge i odgovorni ste za zaštitu tih prava. Mi ne preuzimamo nikakvu odgovornost i ne preuzimamo nikakvu odgovornost za Sadržaj vas ili bilo koje treće strane postove na ili putem usluge. Međutim, postavljanjem sadržaja koristeći uslugu dajete nam pravo i licencu za korištenje, izmjenu, javno obavljanje, javni prikaz, reprodukciju, i distribuciju takvog sadržaja na i kroz uslugu. Slažete se da ova licenca uključuje pravo da vaš sadržaj bude dostupan drugim korisnicima usluge, koji također mogu koristiti Vaš sadržaj pod ovim uslovima. Velika indijska tvrtka (Držeći partnerstvo firma, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ima pravo, ali nije obveza da prati i uređuje sve sadržaje koje pružaju korisnici. Osim toga, Sadržaj pronađen na ili kroz ovu uslugu je vlasništvo Velike indijske tvrtke (Držeći partnerstvo firme, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ili se koristi s dopuštenjem. Ne smijete distribuirati, mijenjati, ponovno koristiti, preuzimati, kopirati, kopirati ili koristiti navedeni sadržaj, u cijelosti ili djelomično, za komercijalne svrhe ili za osobnu dobit, bez ekspresne pismene dozvole od nas.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

Snažno Vam savjetujemo da pregledate Pravila o privatnosti svih stranica koje posjetite. entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Roditelji često pokušavaju pomoći bez preuzimanja. inspir daje porodicaima javne režime ponašanja koji čine učenje vidljivim: savjete, pitanja, objašnjenje-natrag, pregled, i planiranje studija.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Laboratorij za filozofiju

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Filozofija Lab AI Učenje Režim rada je fokusiran režim za korištenje AI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Režim je izgrađen oko specifičnog posla: Istražiti identitet, znanje, pravednost, slobodu, sreću, i drugim dubokim pitanjima kroz pažljivo razmišljanje.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Filozofija Lab AI Režim učenja: praktični vodič

entries.source: Philosophy Lab prompts and study loop
entries.value: Filozofija Lab podstiče i uči petlju

entries.source: philosophy tutor AI
entries.value: tutor filozofije AI

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Fotosinteza: procesne biljke koriste za izradu hrane.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Izaberi bilo koju temu i riješi fokusirani kviz od 10 pitanja višestrukog izbora. Odgovaraš na jedno pitanje odjednom, odmah dobijaš povratnu informaciju i završavaš s rezultatom i pregledom.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Izaberi bilo koju temu i suprotstavi se u pravoj debati. Izaberi stranu, prihvati izazov i nauči graditi bolje argumente.

entries.value: Odaberi ciljeve ponavljanja

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, then jump into the right public guest mode, starter prompt, study path, or guide without hunting through a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Odaberite prvo učenje posao, a zatim skočiti u pravi režim javnog gosta, starter prompt, studija putanju, ili vodič bez lova kroz generički chatbot.

entries.value: Predvidi ocjene i planiraj ciljne rezultate

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Predvidite što kod ili podaci trebaju učiniti prije nego što zatražite pomoć.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Predvidjeti što kod ili podaci trebaju učiniti prije nego pitaju.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Predvidjeti, objasniti, testirati mentalno ili sigurno, i razmišljati o dokazima.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Poželjni blokovi lekcije, mape, simulacije, kontrastni parovi, rubrike, i koncizni trener promiče preko besplatne forme predavanja.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Pripremite sesiju dubokog rada s jasnim ishodom, ograničenjima, pravilima fokusa, kontrolnom tačkom za pregled i rezervnim planom.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Pripremite jasna forumska pitanja, odgovore, sažetke i dodatne zahtjeve koji studentske rasprave čine korisnijim.

entries.value: Pripremi se za ispit

entries.value: Pripremite se za oralno ispitivanje.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Pripremi se za školske intervjue, intervjue za praksu, posao ili stipendiju uz realna pitanja i povratne informacije.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Pripremite učenike za usne ispite kroz realno ispitivanje.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Pripremi govore, prezentacije, intervjue ili usmene ispite uz upite, mjerenje vremena i povratne informacije o strukturi.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Pripremite resurse za učenje za kolege iz razreda ili grupu: sažetke, linkove, bilješke, objašnjenja i upute za korištenje.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Pripremljeni kursevi, video, i vježbe su najjači kada učenik zna temu niz.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Predstavite argument, čekajte na opovrgavanje, identificirati slabe tačke, i ojačati obrazloženje učenika.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Sadašnji dokazi, traže odluke, otkrivaju posljedice i načela ispitivanja.

entries.value: Odredite prioritete zadataka

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Odredi prioritete tema

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritetizirajte teme.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioritet, raspored, dodati praksu i pregled, a zatim prilagoditi kao promjene napretka.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Odrediti prioritete za, smanjiti velike zadatke, pratiti napredak, i blizu s recenzijom.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Privatnost

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Pravila o privatnosti

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Politika privatnosti

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Pravila o privatnosti ≤ inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Privatni sačuvani chat URLs nisu na listi stranica i nisu uključeni u llms.txt, llms-ful.txt, ili JSON AI katalog sadržaja.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Privatno podučavanje je moćno, ali nije jednako dostupno. Besplatna javna AI platforma za učenje može pomoći smanjiti taj pristup jaz dajući više ljudi prvo mjesto za učenje.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Privatno podučavanje je moćno, ali je nejednako raspoređeno. inspir koristi AI za proširenje pristupa dok drži učenika aktivnim: savjete prije odgovora, pitanja prije predavanja, i praksu nakon objašnjenja.

entries.source: Project Coach

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Projekt Trener AI Učenje Režim rada je fokusiran režim za korištenje AI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Režim je izgrađen oko određenog posla: Planirati školu, kreativnost, kodiranje, ili osobni projekt s opsegom, prekretnice, blokatori i sljedeće akcije.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Projekt trener AI Režim učenja: praktični vodič
